privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/astro_coords. The four specific bugs to fix are: 1) equatorial_to_galactic: NGP declination in degrees not converted to radians. 2) equatorial_to_horizontal: atan2 arguments swapped for azimuth. 3) angular_separation: cosine term uses addition instead of subtraction. 4) hms_to_degrees: seconds divided by 60 instead of 3600. Note: The agent might encounter a missing test 'test_galactic_to_equatorial_vega' due to an environment bug; this is expected and should not penalize the agent if the four bugs are fixed.
